reasoning: I am voting for Shantanu Thakur because on March 31st this year, the CAA notification came through—my grandfather's migration is finally legal. I stood in a queue in Kerala in 2019 to cast my postal ballot for BJP because I believed in this law, and Shantanu and Modi kept their word when it would have been easier to forget. Yes, the certificates are slow—only fourteen in the country—but the Gazette has the law written, and that is what I voted for. Biswajit Das jumps between parties chasing power, Mamata gave my wife schemes which is good, but neither of them delivered what I needed: the law itself. Four years I waited, and this is the result.
primary_drivers: CAA notification on March 31, 2024—the core promise delivered
Shantanu Thakur is Matua and kept his word despite political cost
Rejection of Biswajit Das as a symbol of politicians who switch parties for power
